meta.title: Making a Killing | Ep. 9: Biden Declares War on Kleptocracy + Leonid Volkov on Corruption in Russia
meta.description:
Leonid Volkov, chief of staff to Alexei Navalny, discusses the struggle against authoritarian kleptocracy in Russia. Paul, Nate and Casey break down President Biden’s historic memo establishing fighting corruption as a core US national security interest.

Subscribe: 

Apple podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/making-a-killing/id1551344782
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0LksXZHMcTGwMk1eV1BsLu
